eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Pueblo; Custer, CO; at 9:57 AM on JUL 1, 2026 Effective until 8:57 AM JUL 2, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Pueblo County Alert: Due to a wildland fire the homes in part of the Red Creek Ranches area, north of highway 78, south of highway 96, and west of Siloam Rd are under mandatory evacuation. Please evacuate, winds and other factors contribute to very fast movement of fire. Please do not hesitate to evacuate. If you need help evacuating call 911. evac
